landing.title: AlumNet
landing.subtitle: Connect with fellow alumni by career, location, and shared interests.

login.title: Sign In — AlumNet
login.description: Sign in to your AlumNet alumni network account.
login.heading: Sign in
login.subheading: Enter your email and password to access your account.
login.emailConfirmed: Email confirmed! Please sign in to continue.

signup.title: Sign Up — AlumNet
signup.description: Create your AlumNet alumni network account.
signup.heading: Create an account
signup.subheading: Join your alumni network. Enter your details below.
signup.successWithProfile: Account created! Let's set up your profile.
signup.successWithEmail: Account created! Please check your email to verify your account, then log in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password — AlumNet
forgotPassword.heading: Reset password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password — AlumNet
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your AlumNet account.
resetPassword.heading: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.

oauth.error: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.passwordUpdateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.

banned.permanentMessage: Your account has been permanently suspended.
banned.suspendedUntil: Your account has been temporarily suspended until {date}.
banned.suspendedGeneric: Your account has been temporarily suspended.
banned.contactSupport: If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

accountDeleted.expiredMessage: Your account was deleted on {date} and the 30-day grace period has expired. All your data has been permanently removed.
accountDeleted.canRejoin: You can create a new account with the same email address if you wish to rejoin.
accountDeleted.scheduledMessage: Your account was deleted on {date}. Your profile is hidden and your connections have been removed.
accountDeleted.daysRemaining: You have {days} day(s) remaining to reactivate your account before all data is permanently deleted.
accountDeleted.reactivateNote: Note: Your previous connections will need to be re-established after reactivation.

dashboard.subtitle: Here are alumni you might want to connect with.
dashboard.subtitleNoProfile: Set up your profile to discover alumni like you.
dashboard.completenessHint: A complete profile helps you get better recommendations
dashboard.createProfileDesc: Tell us about your career, education, and interests so we can suggest alumni who share your background.
dashboard.noSuggestionsDesc: Complete your profile with your industry, location, and career details to see personalized recommendations.

directory.title: Alumni Directory
directory.description: Discover alumni by name, industry, graduation year, and more.
directory.metaDescription: Discover and connect with fellow alumni.
directory.verifyBanner: Verify your account to see full alumni profiles.
directory.noAlumniFoundDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
directory.noAlumniYetDesc: Be the first to create a profile and start building the alumni network.

messages.title: Messages
messages.restrictedNote: You can still browse conversations but cannot send new messages.
messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
messages.noConversationsDesc: Start a conversation from a connection's profile
messages.enterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
messages.uploadFailed: Failed to upload {count} file(s). Retry or remove them.
messages.reportDesc: Your report is anonymous. A moderator will review the message and take appropriate action.
messages.reportPlaceholder: Describe why this message should be reviewed...
messages.reportSubmittedDesc: A moderator will review this message.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage your alumni network
connections.noConnectionsDesc: Browse the directory to find and connect with alumni.
connections.noPendingDesc: When someone wants to connect with you, it will show up here.
connections.noSentDesc: Connect with alumni from the directory.
connections.noBlockedDesc: Users you block will appear here.

profile.editSubtitle: Keep your profile up to date so alumni can find and connect with you.
profile.photoHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Max 5 MB.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Browse alumni groups by graduation year, career field, location, and more.
groups.metaDescription: Browse and join alumni groups by year, field, or location.
groups.verifyBanner: Verify your account to join groups and connect with fellow alumni.
groups.noGroupsFoundDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
groups.noGroupsYetDesc: Groups will appear here once an admin creates them.
groups.verifyToJoin: Verify your account to join this group.
groups.noMembersYet: No members yet. Be the first to join!

verification.alreadyVerifiedDesc: Your alumni status has been verified. You have full access to the platform.
verification.underReviewDesc: Your verification request was submitted on {date}. An admin will review it shortly.
verification.rejectedDefault: Your previous verification request was not approved. You can submit a new request with updated information.
verification.formDesc: Submit your details so we can confirm you're an alumnus. An admin will review your request.
verification.specPlaceholderHS: e.g., Chuyên Toán, Chuyên Lý, Chuyên Tin
verification.specPlaceholderUni: e.g., Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
verification.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Any additional details that can help verify your alumni status (e.g., clubs, activities, faculty you worked with)
verification.docsHint: Upload transcripts, diplomas, or other proof. Up to {max} files, 2 MB each. PDF, JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
verification.requestSubmittedDesc: Your verification request has been submitted and is under review. You'll be notified once an admin has reviewed it.
verification.maxFilesError: You can upload up to {max} files.
verification.fileNotSupported: {name} is not supported. Use PDF, JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
verification.fileTooLarge: {name} is too large. Maximum is 2 MB per file.

onboarding.metaDescription: Set up your alumni profile to connect with your network.
onboarding.title: Welcome to AlumNet
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your profile. You can always add more details later.
onboarding.photoHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Max 5 MB.
onboarding.googlePhotoHint: Imported from your Google account. You can upload a different photo or remove it.
onboarding.profileCreated: Profile created! Let's set up a few more things.

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Choose which notifications you'd like to receive by email. In-app notifications are always enabled.
settings.notifConnectionRequestDesc: When someone sends you a connection request
settings.notifConnectionAcceptedDesc: When someone accepts your connection request
settings.notifNewMessageDesc: When you receive a new message
settings.notifStalenessDesc: Periodic reminders to keep your profile up to date
settings.dataExportDesc: Download a copy of your data including your profile, career history, education, connections, messages, and group memberships.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action has a 30-day grace period during which you can reactivate your account.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

banners.verificationPending: Your verification is under review. You'll be notified once an admin reviews it.
banners.verificationRejected: Your verification request was not approved.
banners.verificationUnverified: Your account is unverified. Verify your alumni status to unlock full access.
banners.stalenessMessage: Your profile was last updated {time} ago. Is it still accurate?

map.metaDescription: Explore where fellow alumni are located around the world.
map.title: Alumni Map
map.adminDesc: Geographic distribution of alumni across the platform.
map.clickLocation: Click a location on the map to see details
map.alumniInArea: {count, plural, one {alumnus} other {alumni}} in this area

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of platform administration.
dashboard.verificationDesc: Review and approve alumni verification requests.
dashboard.userManagementDesc: Search, filter, and manage platform users.
dashboard.analyticsDesc: Platform usage statistics, trends, and demographics.
dashboard.bulkInviteDesc: Upload a CSV to invite alumni via email.

verification.title: Admin — Verification
verification.description: Review and approve alumni verification requests.
verification.requestDetailDesc: Review the details below and approve or reject this request.
verification.rejectionPlaceholder: Provide a reason for the rejection...

users.title: Admin — Users
users.description: Search, filter, and manage all platform users.
users.noUsersFound: No users found matching your criteria.
users.detailDesc: Manage this user's role, status, and account.
users.cannotModifySelf: You cannot modify your own account.

userAction.banDesc: This will permanently ban the user. They will not be able to access the platform.
userAction.suspendDesc: This will temporarily suspend the user for a specified duration.
userAction.deleteDesc: This will soft-delete the user's account. This action can be reversed within 30 days.
userAction.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a reason for this action...

analytics.title: Platform Analytics
analytics.description: Usage statistics and trends across the platform.
analytics.activityDesc: Connections made and messages sent per month

taxonomy.title: Admin — Taxonomy
taxonomy.noMatch: No industries or specializations match your search.
taxonomy.nameMinError: Name must be at least 2 characters.

announcements.title: Admin — Announcements
announcements.description: Create and manage platform-wide notices for all users.
announcements.noAnnouncements: No announcements yet. Create one to notify all verified users.
announcements.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone. Users who already received the notification will keep it.

bulkInvite.title: Admin — Bulk Invite
bulkInvite.description: Upload a CSV file to invite alumni to the platform.
bulkInvite.csvHint: Only email is required. name and graduation_year are optional. Max 500 rows.
bulkInvite.dropZone: Drop your CSV file here, or click to browse
bulkInvite.parseFailed: Could not parse CSV. Ensure it has an 'email' column header.
bulkInvite.rowsWithErrors: Rows with errors will be skipped.
bulkInvite.noInvites: No invites sent yet. Upload a CSV above to get started.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.stalenessDesc: How long before a profile is considered stale. Users will see an in-app banner and receive an email nudge after this period of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable.

moderation.title: Moderation — Reports
moderation.description: Review reported messages and take action.
moderation.detailDesc: Review the reported message and conversation context.
moderation.escalatedToAdmin: It has been escalated to an admin.

warnDialog.title: Warn User
warnDialog.description: Send a warning to {name}. They will receive a notification and email.
warnDialog.placeholder: Explain the reason for this warning...

muteDialog.title: Mute User
muteDialog.description: Restrict {name} from sending messages for a set period.
muteDialog.placeholder: Explain the reason for muting this user...

escalateDialog.title: Escalate to Admin
escalateDialog.description: Flag this report for admin review. Provide context for why it needs escalation.
escalateDialog.placeholder: Why does this need admin attention? (e.g., potential ban-worthy offense, repeat offender...)
